behavior_summary: U8P_CARTHAXH::hatch computes two temporary parameters (local1, local2) based on game state and then launches a teleport/U8P_CARTHAXH::hatch action by calling teleportToEgg(0x01, local2, local1).
local1 is a mode/flag code: default 0x10, changed to 0x1A if the global flag hydrosFree is set. This toggles an alternate behavior or bitmask passed to the teleport/spawn routine.
local2 selects a location/type: it is set to 0x02 when the NPC is on map 0x1C (Npc::getMap == 0x1C) and 0x05 otherwise.
The function captures the spawned process id (pid) from teleportToEgg into a temporary and then suspends; it does not write global flags.
notable_control_flow: Initialize local1 to 0x10; if global flag hydrosFree is true, set local1 = 0x1A.
Query the NPC's map via Npc::getMap(this); if equal to 0x1C set local2 = 0x02 else set local2 = 0x05.
Call external teleportToEgg with params (0x01, local2, local1) and store returned pid in a temporary.
Suspend the process after launching the teleport/spawn; no further local or global state is modified.
open_questions: What exact gameplay effect teleportToEgg produces (spawn vs. relocate vs. animation attachment) and how its second and third parameters are interpreted.
Precise semantic meaning of the local1 codes 0x10 vs 0x1A (which bits or mode flags they represent).
Whether the spawned pid is used elsewhere (caller or other processes) to track or manage the spawned entity.
Which NPC instance is 'this' in this context (item owner, nearby NPC, or the egg object) and what triggers U8P_CARTHAXH::hatch to run in-game.

main_function.name: U8P_CARTHAXH::hatch
main_function.purpose: Prepare and start a teleport-to-egg/U8P_CARTHAXH::hatch action by selecting a location/type and a mode/flag code based on game state, then launch the teleportToEgg process and suspend.
entry_conditions: Invoked as a process (process type 0x0210) with no explicit parameters in the snippet; likely started when an item/NPC needs to perform a U8P_CARTHAXH::hatch/teleport action.
Behavior depends on the global flag 'hydrosFree' and the NPC's current map id (obtained via Npc::getMap).

function_map.name: U8P_CARTHAXH::hatch
function_map.role: compute U8P_CARTHAXH::hatch/teleport params and launch teleportToEgg

function_map.name: teleportToEgg
function_map.role: spawn or move an entity to/near an egg (external engine/utility called with flags/type params)

function_map.name: Npc::getMap
function_map.role: query the NPC's current map id (used to select local2)

external_calls.purpose: Return the NPC's map id so the function can choose between two location/type codes (0x02 vs 0x05).
Launch a teleport/spawn process using parameters (0x01, local2, local1); pid is captured into a temporary for bookkeeping.

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: When true, switch local1 from default 0x10 to alternate 0x1A to alter teleport/spawn behavior or mode.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_CARTHAXH::hatch computes two temporary parameters (local1, local2) based on game state and then launches a teleport/U8P_CARTHAXH::hatch action by calling teleportToEgg(0x01, local2, local1).
